title: The 'Collected Poems of Donald J. Trump' is for sale at the RNC
shortDescription: One fan believes Donald Trump's musing on X, formerly Twitter, is worthy of a poetry collection that is on sale at the Republican National Convention.

title: Ron DeSantis touts Trump, slams Biden in fiery speech at RNC

title: Trump rally shooting: What's real, what's not and how we know

title: Trump's takeover: In redefined GOP, populism and a new coalition reign
shortDescription: It's not the party of Reagan and the Bushes anymore. The Republican Party has been recast, and it looks and sounds like Donald Trump.

title: Greeted by boos, former rival Nikki Haley endorses Donald Trump at RNC
